## AddressBaseSchema variable

Base schema for Address entity. Used for list views and minimal data fetching for performance. Contains only essential fields without relationships.

**Signature:**

```typescript
AddressBaseSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		id: z.ZodString
		line1: z.ZodString
		city: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'City'>
		unit: z.ZodString
		postalCode: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'PostalCode'>
		country: z.ZodString
		createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		id: string
		line1: string
		city: string & z.BRAND<'City'>
		unit: string
		postalCode: string & z.BRAND<'PostalCode'>
		country: string
		createdAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
	},
	{
		id: string
		line1: string
		city: string
		unit: string
		postalCode: string
		country: string
		createdAt: Date
		updatedAt: Date
	}
>
```
